Google Sheets setup
1. Create the spreadsheet

Create a Google Sheet with these column headers in Row 1:

A	B	C	D	E	F	G	H
Timestamp	Guest Name	Attending	Accommodation	Transportation	Dietary	Brunch	Song

2. Add the Apps Script

function doPost(e) {
  var sheet = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet().getActiveSheet();
  var data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);

  sheet.appendRow([
    new Date(),
    data.guestName || '',
    data.attending || '',
    data.accommodation || '',
    data.transportation || '',
    data.dietary || '',
    data.brunch || '',
    data.song || ''
  ]);

  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ result: 'success' }))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

Go to Extensions → Apps Script, replace the code with:

3. Deploy the Apps Script

Click Deploy → New deployment
Type: Web app
Execute as: Me
Who has access: Anyone
Click Deploy and copy the URL (looks like https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfyc.../exec)

4. Set the environment variable in Cloudflare

Go to Cloudflare Dashboard → Pages → your project → Settings → Environment variables
Add: GOOGLE_SCRIPT_URL = the Apps Script URL you copied
Set it for both Production and Preview
After your next deploy, clicking SUBMIT RSVP will send data through /api/rsvp → Cloudflare Pages Function → Google Apps Script → your spreadsheet.
